title: Agentic Workspace Evaluation Observation
description: One local-first append record for an owner-bound evaluation.

kind.description: Discriminator identifying one evaluation observation record.

recorded_at.description: Timestamp for when the observation was appended.

evaluation_id.description: Registered evaluation id this observation belongs to.

definition_revision.description: Definition revision observed when the record was appended.

criterion.description: Criterion id from the registered evaluation definition.

result.description: Observation result for the selected criterion.

context.description: Structured context facts for this observation.

evidence_refs.description: External evidence references; raw logs are not copied by default.

burden.description: Collection or review burden for this observation.

finding.description: Compact finding text derived from the observation.

recommended_action.description: Bounded next action recommended by the observer, when any.
